mapper.sql: id, type_id, label, value, css_class, list_class, is_default, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dict_data WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, label, value, sort FROM sys_dict_data WHERE type_id = #{typeId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT d.id, d.label, d.value, d.sort FROM sys_dict_data d JOIN sys_dict_type t ON d.type_id = t.id AND t.deleted = 0 WHERE t.code = #{code} AND d.status = 1 AND d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.sort ASC, d.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict_data (type_id, label, value, css_class, list_class, is_default, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{typeId}, #{label}, #{value}, #{cssClass}, #{listClass}, #{isDefault}, #{sort}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_data SET label = #{label}, value = #{value}, css_class = #{cssClass}, list_class = #{listClass}, is_default = #{isDefault}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET deleted = 1 WHERE type_id = #{typeId}
